Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Bay Cities Asbestos Co., Ltd.
Off Calendar Jan-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Michael Espinosa, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Jeanne Kinney, as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir of Curtis Kinney, Deceased, and Michael Kinney, as Wrongful Death Heir of Curtis Kinney, Deceased.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Bay Cities Asbestos Co., Ltd.
Default was entered against defendant Bay Cities Asbestos Co., Ltd. on February 11, 2016.
Statement of Damages was filed and served on February 22, 2016.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 4, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Jeanne Kinney, as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir of Curtis Kinney, Deceased, and Michael Kinney, as Wrongful Death Heir of Curtis Kinney, Deceased, and against the Defaulted Defendant Bay Cities Asbestos Co., Ltd., as follows:

Economic Damages - $242,793.53.
Non-Economic Damages - $11,000,000.00.
Total - $11,242,793.53.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
